title: Student-level equalities analysis for A level and VTQs – 2025
body: "This is the executive summary of an interactive report presenting Ofqual’s equalities analysis of A levels and a subset of vocational and technical qualifications.  This analysis highlights how differences in results between groups of students with different protected characteristics and socio-economic status have changed in 2025 in relation to previous years. "

taxons.title: Key stage 3 and 4 exam marking, qualifications and results
